---
title: '`syncweaver init`'
---

Initialize syncweaver boilerplate and starter content in local or remote
repositories.

| Subcommand | Description |
|---|---|
| [`host`](host.qmd) | Initialize host repository boilerplate and orchestrator registration |
| [`orch`](orch.qmd) | Initialize orchestrator repository files from packaged templates |

## Usage

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
from ccbr_tools.shell import shell_run

help_text = shell_run("syncweaver init --help")
print("```")
print(help_text)
print("```")
```
